name: Baseline
aesthetic: Technical drafting, grid paper, blueprint feel. Raw and legible — this is the baseline everything else departs from.
constraint: Monospace type only. Two colors maximum. Single scrolling column. No decorative elements.
promptSummary: Build the first version of the Living Portfolio as a fully isolated Next.js route group. Intentionally raw and simple — a technical drawing, not a finished design. Must render all content schema fields correctly.

patches.note: Redesigned visual language based on inspiration references. Shifted from dark blueprint to light document/archive aesthetic. Cream background (#f4f2ed), near-black ink, typographic hero with discipline listing, numbered project list with image placeholders, receipt-style CV, document-table About layout.
Layout redesigned — editorial catalogue direction, horizontal row grid replacing single column.
Added individual project detail pages at /v0/projects/[id] with full case study layout.
Typeface system updated — DM Mono (all caps, monospace) as root font, DM Sans (title case) for all headings.
Implemented full dark theme from Figma — #191919 background, white foreground, opacity-based rule and muted scales.
Year section dividers added to work page and homepage, grouping projects by year with horizontal rule.
Sidebar redesigned — full viewport height, sticky, logo fixed to bottom-left corner. Real J-mark SVG logo replaces placeholder.
Beta banner updated with warning triangle SVGs either side. Version switcher restyled to match Figma spec with pill links, dropdown arrow, and external link arrow SVGs.
Both top bars (beta banner + version switcher) made sticky with correct stacking offsets. Nav removed from sidebar. Divider stroke between sidebar and content removed.
Year section headers made sticky and stacking — each year header sticks below the previous, building a visible stack as the user scrolls. Headers are anchor links that smooth-scroll to their section.
Project rows hover interaction — date column slides right 10px on hover, agency column slides left 10px, both with 300ms ease transition.
Logo moved from sidebar into version switcher bar. Sidebar removed. Content area expanded to full width.
Favicon updated to J-mark SVG via Next.js app/icon.svg convention.
Project row columns restructured — five equal columns: date (120px fixed), title, role, type, agency. Role and type values stack vertically when comma-separated. Agency right-aligned.
Type filter added above project list — single-select pill group with All active by default. Filters projects by medium. Shared between homepage and /v0/projects via ProjectList client component.
Filter pill styling — fully rounded corners (border-radius: 100px), active state inverts to white fill with #191919 text.
Hero copy updated — replaced discipline list with bio copy. Grow links to thisisgrow.com, Speedway Press links to speedway.press.
Hero text animated with GSAP — line-by-line reveal, words grouped by rendered vertical position, each line fades and slides up 14px with 140ms stagger between lines.

Project detail panel open animation — replaced broken FLIP morph attempt with GSAP staggered reveal: panel lifts from y:20, background fades in, then header → title block → image strip stagger in top-to-bottom.

Logo click SPA navigation — J logo in the version switcher always returns to the current version's root even when a project detail is open. Intercepts link click, pushes version root to history, dispatches synthetic popstate so the SPA handles its own close animation.

Chrome bars locked as position:fixed — beta banner z-index:100, version switcher z-index:99. Added --chrome-height CSS variable (88px) and body padding-top to compensate for bars leaving document flow. Version UI elements must stay below z-index 90. CLAUDE.md updated with z-index convention and expanded locked files list.
Change-log button text color updated to match version pill active color (#ffffff).

Fixed close animation blink — ScrollReset was calling window.scrollTo(0,0) every time Next.js updated usePathname(), which fired when history.pushState('/v0') caused Next.js to recognise a valid route change. Fixed by removing ScrollReset from the v0 layout (not needed for a SPA) and moving history.replaceState to the start of closeProject so the URL change is hidden behind the still-visible panel.

Project preview image rows hidden by default — image row collapses to height:0 with no padding. Hovering a project row expands it to 155px with a 280ms ease transition on both height and padding-bottom.
Year section header font size increased from 12px to 14px.

Scroll anywhere on project detail page — wheel listener moved from window to the panel element with passive:false. Chrome's threaded scroll optimiser requires a non-passive listener on the nearest overflow container to guarantee event dispatch to JS, regardless of cursor position within the panel.

Scroll-in entrance animation per project row — GSAP ScrollTrigger animates each row from opacity:0 / y:14 as it enters the viewport (start: top 92%, once:true). Animation runs once on mount only; filter changes are instant to avoid ScrollTrigger.refresh() triggering a scroll-to-top.

Smooth scroll added via Lenis (lerp:0.08) — driven off GSAP's ticker so ScrollTrigger stays in sync. Lenis instance stored in a module-level singleton (smoothScroll.ts) so V0App can stop/start it while the project detail panel is open.
Project row hover animation delay — 0.12s delay added to imageRow height and padding-bottom transitions so the preview images only expand if the cursor lingers.
Hero right column replaced with contact links — email, phone, and Instagram replacing previous stats. Links styled with heroMeta class, hover opacity transition.
Spacing added between hero and project list — filterBar given margin-top:80px to create clear visual separation from the hero section.

Sticky filter bar — filter pills now stick below the chrome as you scroll through the project list. Extracted from .pageHeader into a sibling element so its sticky parent is the tall outer container. Year headers re-offset to stack below the filter bar.

Filter bar padding retained in sticky state — padding:24px 0 12px gives visual breathing room above the pills when stuck to the top. box-shadow:0 8px 0 var(--bg) seals any sub-pixel gap between the filter bar bottom and the year header background below.

Mobile sticky filter fix — ResizeObserver watches the filter bar element and updates filterBarHeight state whenever pills wrap to a new line. Year header top and scrollMarginTop values are now derived from the measured height rather than a hardcoded pixel constant.
Hero copy font weight reduced from 400 to 300 — DM Sans 300 weight added to the font load in the v0 layout.

Smooth horizontal scroll on project detail page — wheel handler replaced with GSAP-tweened scrollLeft (power3.out, duration:1.1). Delta accumulates into a clamped target; each wheel event overwrites the in-progress tween for a natural momentum feel.

Project detail header redesigned — back button replaced with white pill matching active filter style, home icon SVG replacing the arrow. Project counter replaced with white pill containing left/right chevron buttons for paging through projects and a centred XX/XX counter.

Prev/next project navigation — chevron buttons in the project counter pill page through projects in sorted order. URL updates via history.replaceState. history.replaceState moved out of the setActive functional updater to avoid triggering a Router setState during render.

Project page transition animation — clicking prev/next animates the title block and image strip out (slide + fade) before swapping content, then animates the new content in. Content is driven by a displayProject state that lags behind the incoming prop so GSAP has stable DOM targets across the swap. hasMounted pattern replaced with a project.id equality check for React 18 Strict Mode safety.

Directional project transitions — right arrow: current content exits right, new content enters from the left. Left arrow: current content exits left, new content enters from the right. Direction captured in a ref at the start of the exit animation so the async onComplete can correctly position the entering content.

Hard refresh project URL fix — /v0/projects/[id] previously served a stale standalone server-rendered page. Now renders V0App directly; getInitialActive reads the pathname on mount and opens the correct project panel with current styles.

Fixed intermittent blank content on project page switcher — replaced gsap.killTweensOf() with timeline.kill() on exit and enter timeline refs. killTweensOf() could fire a stale onComplete callback which corrupted the displayProject state; .kill() suppresses onComplete entirely.
Mobile hero headline size — clamp(22px, 5.5vw, 28px).

Filter scroll clamping — page can no longer scroll past the filter bar's sticky threshold when a filter set has few items. stickThreshold captured once at mount. Delta approach computes exact minHeight adjustment accounting for ancestor padding-bottom (128px on .contentWrap). minHeight locked before re-render to prevent jump.

All filter scroll-to-top fix — clearFilters and toggle-off paths no longer call lenis.resize(). Lenis has its own ResizeObserver; forced resize() on list shrink was causing Lenis to reset scroll position to the top.

React hydration fix — getInitialActive moved from useState initialiser into useEffect. Running it during hydration returned a non-null project on the client while the server returned null, causing a tree mismatch.

React hydration fix — formatDate now passes timeZone:'UTC' to toLocaleDateString and uses getUTCFullYear(). Without this, ISO date-only strings (e.g. 2023-12-01) parsed as UTC midnight produced different month names on server (UTC) vs client (western timezones).

Horizontal scroll indicator added to project detail panel — thin 2px track (120px wide) centered at the bottom of the panel with a proportional thumb. Only visible when content overflows. Thumb width scales with scrollWidth/clientWidth ratio; position tracks scrollLeft 1:1.
Project navigation animation direction reversed — right arrow: new content enters from the right. Left arrow: new content enters from the left.

Scroll indicator updates immediately on project switch — added useEffect on displayProject to recalculate scrollRatio and scrollProgress after the new image list renders, so thumb size is correct before the user scrolls.
Scroll indicator thumb animates on resize — width transitions with a 0.35s cubic-bezier ease when the project changes. Position (left) has no transition so it tracks scroll 1:1 without lag.
VersionSwitcher mix-blend-mode moved from individual child elements (.logo, .label) to the parent .switcher container so the entire bar composites uniformly against page content.
Optional url field added to Project TypeScript interface — rendered as a 'Visit the live site' pill link on the PDP title block.

Ingested 5 new projects via inbox workflow — Color Study Branding, Speed Shapes Branding, BandUp Gotti Branding, Frank & Patty's Marketing, Only You Marketing. All assets renamed descriptively, pixel dimensions baked into schema entries.
Ingested Symmetry Glassing Branding via inbox workflow — 8 images, 2 videos. Collaborator: Aidan Molloy.

Project dateAdded values corrected — Color Study (Nov 2025), Speed Shapes (Oct 2025), BandUp Gotti (May 2025), Frank & Patty's (Jun 2025), Only You (Apr 2024). Portfolio now sorts newest-first: Symmetry Glassing → Color Study → Speed Shapes → Frank & Patty's → BandUp Gotti → Rock Hall → Only You → PING → Thrift & Ride.

Duplicate video removed from Speed Shapes (brand-anim-02 and brand-anim-03 were identical). Asset ordering adjusted across Speed Shapes and Color Study — surfboard photos moved earlier, shadow studies placed adjacent, directors chair and credits screen moved to end.

Image/video interleave algorithm rewritten — LEAD_IMAGES reduced from 2 to 1 so the first video appears second in the scroll row. Proportional interleave replaced with stride-based distribution that spaces remaining videos evenly across the image stream, preventing early video clustering.

Project menu added to PDP pagination pill — clicking the center counter expands the pill into a rounded-rectangle menu listing all projects by date and title. Active project highlighted. GSAP-animated open/close with synchronized width, height, and border-radius transitions. Escape key and backdrop click to dismiss.

Tags and medium values consolidated across all projects — 24 unique tags reduced to 16 (identity→branding, apparel→merch, film→motion, graphic art→design, platform→web, social/poster/event→marketing). 12 medium values reduced to 9.
Homepage hero type size set to fixed 22px (was clamp 20–32px). Mobile breakpoint adjusted to clamp(16px, 4.5vw, 22px). Max-width set to 520px across all breakpoints to maintain 3-line text wrapping.
Mobile PDP meta grid changed from single-column stack to 2×2 layout — Year and Medium on row 1, Role and Credits on row 2.
PDP pagination pill centered horizontally on landscape mobile and below (max-width: 900px).
Mobile project row spacing — row-gap between title and tags increased from 6px to 12px.
